outline.caption: Master the art of hand-off paperwork to the VA. Learn when to hand over Yellow Ribbon paperwork directly, ensuring a smooth transition. Discover more tips on handling student veteran paperwork. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 1, as it could benefit from a more engaging headline to grab attention. The top fix would be to add a more compelling headline that highlights the importance of the step.
